ValidationRule.description: When "Purchase Order Required" is checked, the PO reference and the request date must be provided.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( PurchaseOrderRequired__c = TRUE, ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Billable"), OR( ISBLANK(PurchaseOrderRequestDate__c), ISBLANK(PurchaseOrderReference__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must provide the Purchase Order Reference and Purchase Order Request Date
